poll_question_placeholder: E.g.: What evening works best for you?
notify_guests_poll_hint: Send a notification to invite them to vote on the poll.
announce_results_hint: Send a notification to all guests with the results.
delete_post_hint: This post will be permanently deleted.
delete_poll_hint: All votes will be permanently lost.
poll_results_no_votes: The poll "{{question}}" is over — no votes.
poll_results_winner_one: Poll results for "{{question}}": "{{winner}}" leads with {{count}} vote out of {{total}}.
poll_results_winner_other: Poll results for "{{question}}": "{{winner}}" leads with {{count}} votes out of {{total}}.
poll_results_tie_one: Poll results for "{{question}}": tie between {{winners}} ({{count}} vote each).
poll_results_tie_other: Poll results for "{{question}}": tie between {{winners}} ({{count}} votes each).
